examples.title: Two Forces On Block
examples.content: Force A: 5 N north. Force B: 3 N east. Place both at origin (tail-to-tail). Complete parallelogram. Diagonal = resultant ≈ 5.8 N northeast.

examples.title: Displacement By Two Paths
examples.content: Walk 4 km north AND 4 km east simultaneously (like wind + your walking). Parallelogram diagonal = √(4²+4²)≈5.7 km. Same as head-to-tail method!

examples.title: Electric Field Superposition
examples.content: Two charges create fields. Tail-to-tail placement shows how fields combine. The parallelogram diagonal is the net field.
